title: Recovery System
subtitle: Fault-tolerant recovery avionics with triple-MCU voting and ten high-current deployment channels
stackup: Six copper-layer mixed-signal avionics PCB with high-current recovery-driver routing and separated logic/power regions
summary: A six-layer mixed-signal recovery controller for fault-tolerant rocket deployment. The board combines dual input power paths, four regulated power stages, three independent STM32 control domains, discrete median-voting logic, redundant hardware safing, inertial and environmental sensing, and ten 24 V ignition channels.
keyComponents: Hardware RBF, ESTOP, and abort paths
mainConstraints: Preserve fault independence across redundant power, compute, and deployment paths
Minimize high di/dt loop area through the ignition switches, connectors, and return paths
Isolate low-voltage sensing and voting logic from high-current deployment circuitry
Maintain deterministic hardware inhibition through RBF, ESTOP, abort, and software-controlled enables
Keep power-distribution impedance low enough to support simultaneous deployment without resetting control electronics
publicNote: This portfolio entry is derived from the exported Altium schematic PDF. It does not parse or include raw .SchDoc or .PcbDoc files.

model3d.title: Recovery Board 3D Model
model3d.description: Interactive 3D board model from the Altium STEP export.

featured.title: Recovery Driver Bank
featured.description: Deployment switches, local capacitance, output connectors, and return paths arranged to constrain high di/dt current loops while maintaining separation between control and power regions.

featured.title: Voting Logic Core
featured.description: Three independent control domains feed discrete voting logic before any deployment command reaches the output drivers. Separate RBF, ESTOP, abort, and software enables keep deployment inhibited during integration and flight operations.

featured.title: Dual Power Path
featured.description: Dual protected input paths and regulated power stages sized for simultaneous deployment transients without resetting downstream control electronics.

pages.title: Exported Schematic PDF
pages.description: Exported Altium schematic PDF. Use the embedded browser PDF viewer and the PDF's own sheet links to browse input connectors, power, microcontrollers, voting logic, sensors, and recovery drivers.
